extraction_notes: Product name extracted as the EPD title: 'Chlorine ISCC PLUS certified'.
Production location combines multiple sites named in the EPD; no single country/region applies to all sites.
Secondary databases mention generic 'Sphera datasets' rather than the accepted 'Sphera Managed Content 2024'.
Extracted with an LLM. Human review is required before shipping.
